title: AIBE 21 Exam Date 2026 - Check Official Schedule & Key Dates

detail.title: AIBE 21 Exam Date 2026 - Check Official Schedule & Key Dates
detail.short_info: AIBE 21 Exam Date 2026 has been released. Candidates can check the official timetable for the All India Bar Examination and plan their exam preparation accordingly.

sections.heading: AIBE 21 Exam Date 2026 - Check Official Schedule & Key Dates

content.text: Quick Summary: AIBE 21 (XXI) Exam Date 2026 has been officially announced by the Bar Council of India (BCI). The examination is scheduled for June 7, 2026. Registration and other key dates are also released. Check details below for updates.
Direct Link to Download AIBE 21 Exam Date 2026 PDF Here

sections.heading: Latest Updates on AIBE 21 Exam Date 2026

items: AIBE 21 (XXI) Exam Date announced on January 07, 2026
Candidates must enroll with State Bar Council before applying

content.text: The AIBE 21 (XXI) 2026 is the All India Bar Examination conducted by the Bar Council of India. It is a certification exam that assesses law graduates' eligibility to practice law in India. Key aspects include:

items: Qualifying marks: 45% for General/OBC, 40% for SC/ST/PwD
Certificate of Practice (CoP) issued to qualifiers

content.text: Candidates must clear AIBE to obtain the CoP and practice in courts.

sections.heading: How to Apply for AIBE 21 Exam 2026? (Step-by-Step)

content.text: Follow these steps once registration opens:

items: Visit Official Website: Go to allindiabarexamination.com
Register: Click on registration link and create account
Fill Application: Enter personal, enrollment, and exam details
Upload Documents: Photo, signature, enrollment certificate
Print Confirmation: Save application for reference

rows: Expected 10 AM - 1 PM or similar (to be confirmed)
